Good evening, This yearвАЩs FIFA World Cup will be the first to feature billionaire playersвАФ41-year-old Cristiano Ronaldo captaining Portugal and 38-year-old Lionel Messi leading Argentina in its title defense. However, they arenвАЩt the only players raking it in. Here are the 11 highest-paid players competing this year. Thanks for reading! Kris Kornbluth Assistant Editor, Platforms & Curation More Recommended Reads Miguel J. Rodriguez Carrillo/AFP via Getty Images Why Selling Your SpaceX Shares Too Quickly Could Cost You Flipping IPO shares isnвАЩt against the law. But at some brokerages, you might get penalized. The Dallas Morning News via Getty Images Karmelo Anthony ConvictionвАФHow A Teenage Stabbing Case Became A Racial Flashpoint In Texas The case captured the attention of well-known figures, including rapper Cardi B, who said the sentence was "disgusting."

74337.subject: Mastercard Opens Its Rails to AI Agents
74337.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

* **[Mastercard](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/mastercard-agent-pay-machines-ap4m-ai-agents-crypto-partners)**[ opens its card rails to AI agents, 31 partners](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/mastercard-agent-pay-machines-ap4m-ai-agents-crypto-partners)

* **[Ripple](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/ripple-xrpl-ai-starter-kit-mastercard-agent-pay-machines)**[ ships XRPL AI kit as Mastercard names it partner](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/ripple-xrpl-ai-starter-kit-mastercard-agent-pay-machines)

* **[DOJ](https://thedefiant.io/converge/regulation/doj-opens-debanking-probe-jpmorgan-bank-of-america-wells-fargo)**[ subpoenas JPMorgan, BofA, Wells Fargo over debanking](https://thedefiant.io/converge/regulation/doj-opens-debanking-probe-jpmorgan-bank-of-america-wells-fargo)

* **[Japan's megabanks](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/japan-megabanks-mufg-mizuho-and-smbc-establish-joint-stablecoin-council)**[ form yen stablecoin council, live by 2027](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/japan-megabanks-mufg-mizuho-and-smbc-establish-joint-stablecoin-council)

* **[Binance](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/binance-launches-bstocks-tokenized-us-equities-24-7-onchain-trading)**[ puts brokerage stocks on-chain with bStocks launch](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/binance-launches-bstocks-tokenized-us-equities-24-7-onchain-trading)

AI-meets-crypto stories today. **Mastercard** opened its card network to autonomous AI agents on Wednesday, launching **[Agent Pay for Machines](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/mastercard-agent-pay-machines-ap4m-ai-agents-crypto-partners)** with **31 partners**; Coinbase, RippleX, Solana Foundation, Polygon, Aave Labs, and Stellar among them, and stablecoin settlement built in from day one. Within the same news cycle, **Ripple** shipped the [XRPL AI Starter Kit](https://thedefiant.io/converge/tradfi-and-fintech/ripple-xrpl-ai-starter-kit-mastercard-agent-pay-machines), wiring XRP and RLUSD payments into the agent toolchains devs already use.

**Read more below!**

вАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФ

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/9d5fb1f6-e233-4313-8e53-76981459f988/image.png)
Caption: 

Nexo is a digital wealth platform offering crypto yield up to 15% and crypto-backed credit lines from 1.9%. **[Join and get 30-day access to exclusive rates](https://nexo.com/defiant2)**. Terms apply.

вАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФвАФ

## DeFi's Near-Death Moment | Mike Silagadze on Ether.fi, Security, and What Comes Next

How close did DeFi come to a systemic collapse? **Camila Russo** sits down with **Mike Silagadze**, co-founder and CEO of Ether.fi, for the full post-mortem on the Kelp exploit and the DeFi United rescue вАФ why the default path could

74335.subject: The Daily Degen - June 10th, 2026
74335.sender: The Daily Degen from The Daily Degen <thedailydegen@substack.com>
74335.body:
View this post on the web at https://thedailydegen.substack.com/p/the-daily-degen-june-10th-2026

Happy Wednesday friends! Tons of stuff going on!
LetвАЩs dive in!
As alwaysвА¶ stats/alerts/etc at top and tweets/news/links/videos/etc at bottomвА¶ and all tweets are hyperlinked so just click on them to pull them up on Twitter/X!
Market Update
Crypto (from @CryptoBubbles)
Total Crypto Market Cap: $2.207T
QQQ (Nasdaq 100): $695.30
Gold: $4,081.90
Silver: $63.63
Oil (WTI): $90.55
US 10Y Treasury: 4.544%
Crypto Fear & Greed Index (from coinmarketcap(dot)com): 15
Biggest Price Movers
(From @coingecko top 1000, by 24 hour change)
Spotlight
Big announcement from the legends at @maplefinance [ https://substack.com/redirect/828ddc83-6a5f-4550-afef-6163efc80d97?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] - $HYPE is now accepted as collateral!
As stated in the official announcement below:
вАЬ$HYPE is accepted collateral at Maple. 
Institutions holding it can borrow against their position on tailored, overcollateralized terms, structured and managed by the Maple credit team. 
No selling required.вАЭ
There are tons of other cool things going on as well, and if you want to learn all about them, check out the recent interview that Maple co-founder @syrupsid [ https://substack.com/redirect/0c96df1f-f424-4baa-8e35-f59ebd72802c?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] did with @Genfinity below!
And- as always- make sure to follow Maple on Twitter [ https://substack.com/redirect/828ddc83-6a5f-4550-afef-6163efc80d97?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] for more updates too, and stay tuned as we continue bringing attention to everything they are doing!
Biggest TVL Movers + Other Interesting Data
Chains are mostly red today. Best-performing top 25 chain on the weekly is Ink (#13) at +27.01%. 
Protocols are mixed today. Best-performing top 50 protocol on the weekly is Sentora (#25) at +23.60%. 
HereвАЩs The Top 12 Fastest-Growing Chains By TVL On The Weekly With At Least $20M TVL (from @DefiLlama):
HereвАЩs The Top 12 Fastest-Growing Protocols By TVL On The Weekly With At Least $20M TVL (from @DefiLlama):
HereвАЩs The Top 10 Entities By 7 Day Revenue Generation (from @DefiLlama):
New Projects
(note: this includes new projects we find through combing Twitter each day and going through newly launched protocols added by @DefiLlama, limited primarily to new projects that have at least some TVL or are followed by at least some of our mutualsвА¶ Disclaimer: these are not pre-vetted by us so make sure to DYOR!)
-New project called @tradeonpear. Twitter bio states вАЬTrade your instincts.вАЭ Followed by 14 of our mutuals. h/t @rektonomist_:
-New project called @olivetreeyield. Twitter bio states вАЬStablecoin-powered annuitiesвАЭ. Followed by 14 of our mutuals. h/t @lmrankhan:
Top Stablecoin Yields
(note: these are the top Stablecoin Yields, sourced from @DefiLlama (all types, $10M+ TVL o

74330.subject: рЯФЈ The Daily: House crypto tax hearing divide
74330.body:
CFTC unveils sweeping rule proposal for fast-growing prediction markets | Bitcoin Layer 2 Botanix to wind down network, urges users to withdraw assets | Japan's three megabanks to debut live stablecoin transactions by March 2027 | More than 50% of bitcoin supply is underwater; prior bottoms followed within weeks, often after a final leg lower: K33 |

The Daily ( https://www.theblock.co/?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Written by James Hunt | Edited by Kyle Baird

Presented by

LMAX ( https://www.theblock.co/lmax?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

Happy Wednesday! *Bitcoin* is hovering near cycle lows as ETF outflows mount and rate fears linger, with analysts at *CoinShares* , *QCP Capital* , and *Capital.com* pointing ( https://www.theblock.co/post/404237/in-the-shadow-of-geopolitics-and-ai-bitcoin-hovers-near-cycle-lows-as-etf-outflows-and-rate-fears-deepen-worst-stretch-of-2026?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) to a toxic mix of geopolitical tensions, hawkish *Fed* expectations, and capital flowing toward AI-linked trades.

In today's newsletter, a *House* committee debates how to *tax digital assets* , the *CFTC* introduces a slate of new rules for *prediction markets* , *Botanix* is winding down its *Bitcoin* Layer 2 network, and more.

Meanwhile, *Ethereum* could become a fully zero-knowledge proof-based protocol in 3 to 5 years, according to *Joe Lubin* ( https://www.theblock.co/post/404185/ethereum-fully-zero-knowledge-proof-based-protocol-3-to-5-years-joe-lubin?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ).

Plus, *Fold* shares jump 160% ( https://www.theblock.co/post/404272/fold-discloses-45-million-bitcoin-sale-pays-off-collateralized-debt-in-full-shares-surge-160?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) after disclosing a $45 million *bitcoin* sale and paying off its collateralized debt in full.

*P.S.* Don't forget to check out The Funding , a biweekly rundown of crypto VC trends. It's a great read вАФ and just like The Daily , it's free to subscribe ( https://www.theblock.co/newsletters?select=The%20Funding&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_source=newsletter&utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters ) !

*THE BIG ONE*

*рЯПЫпЄП House crypto tax hearing reveals divide over urgency in advancing legislation*

( https://www.theblock.co/post/404187/house-crypto-tax-hearing-legislation?utm_campaign=website&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=theblocknewsletters )

The *House Ways and Means Committee* held its first digital asset tax hearing in years as lawmakers debated how to build a framework for taxing crypto.

* Republicans recently introduced seven crypto tax bills covering
